title: Export FFI, dynamic types, AotBuildRequest link libraries

source.subject: feat(v0.3): export FFI, dynamic types, and AotBuildRequest link libraries

body:
## What shipped

Compiler implements link-time **export FFI**: dynamic types, exportable symbols, and `AotBuildRequest` link-library fields for native interop.

## Platform specification

- **Export FFI** — `/platform-spec/execution/ffi/export-ffi` — *implements* (required)

## Source commit

Repository **`compiler`** · commit `5e91147`

> feat(v0.3): export FFI, dynamic types, and AotBuildRequest link libraries

## Completed

2026-05-24 (catalog cutoff window).
